VAL-NUM-001.title: Logprobs are computed in float32 regardless of model dtype

evidence.codeInspection: 4 separate code paths all guard with `if logits.dtype == .bfloat16 { logits = logits.asType(.float32) }` before logSoftmax: LogprobsCollector.capture(), TokenIterator.sample(), Evaluate.prepare() prompt logprobs, Engine.loglikelihoodFastPath()
evidence.numericalTest: 36 logprob values across 6 token positions: 0 NaN, 0 Inf, 0 positive values. Softmax sums at all positions ≤1.0 (range: 0.999686–1.000000)

VAL-CHAT-001.title: Chat completions logprobs shape is stable

evidence.nonStreaming: choices[0].logprobs.content is array of 6 objects with token (string), logprob (number), top_logprobs (array). No legacy flat-array fields present.
evidence.streaming: 12 SSE chunks with logprobs in content-array format, correctly interleaved with content deltas

VAL-CHAT-002.title: Chat completions logprobs do not break tool-call streaming

evidence.interleaving: 3 logprobs chunks interleaved with 2 tool_call deltas in SSE stream. finish_reason='tool_calls'.
evidence.toolCallIntegrity: Tool call JSON args parse correctly — no corruption from logprob chunks
evidence.note: Model required explicit system prompt to trigger tool calls; casual prompts resulted in text responses only

hardware: MacBook Pro (Mac16,5), Apple M4 Max, 128 GB RAM
